description: Ideas and techniques for designing, developing, and modifying large software systems. Topics include software engineering processes; requirements and specifications; project team organization and management; software architectures; design patterns; testing and debugging; and cost and quality metrics and estimation. Students will work in large teams on a substantial programming project.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (COMP SCI 367 or400) and (COMP SCI 407,536,537, 545,559,564,570, 679 orE C E/​COMP SCI  552) or graduate/professional standing, or declared in the Capstone Certificate in Computer Sciences for Professionals
